fullOutput:
# Commands that should be applied only for interactive shells.
[[ $- == *i* ]] || return

HISTFILESIZE=100000
HISTSIZE=10000

shopt -s histappend
shopt -s checkwinsize
shopt -s extglob
shopt -s globstar
shopt -s checkjobs

alias cat=bat
alias l=exa
alias ls=exa

if [[ ! -v BASH_COMPLETION_VERSINFO ]]; then
  . "/nix/store/pnjcffrw553ayqgwx5q7906qp0hfyl7d-bash-completion-2.16.0/etc/profile.d/bash_completion.sh"
fi

if [[ -n "${GHOSTTY_RESOURCES_DIR}" ]]; then
  builtin source "${GHOSTTY_RESOURCES_DIR}/shell-integration/bash/ghostty.bash"
fi

if [[ :$SHELLOPTS: =~ :(vi|emacs): ]]; then
  eval "$(/nix/store/ygamr51w6f2i0fvmyxznpzcgz2sq3x7f-fzf-0.66.1/bin/fzf --bash)"
fi

. /nix/store/7n8pwcibgvl5qb5jinh57a2n9ffv0fp7-autojump-22.5.3/share/autojump/autojump.bash

function y() {
  local tmp="$(mktemp -t "yazi-cwd.XXXXX")"
  yazi "$@" --cwd-file="$tmp"
  if cwd="$(cat -- "$tmp")" && [ -n "$cwd" ] && [ "$cwd" != "$PWD" ]; then
    builtin cd -- "$cwd"
  fi
  rm -f -- "$tmp"
}

if [[ $TERM != "dumb" ]]; then
  eval "$(/nix/store/y2v4dlbvp495vpcll87yqjkjsvw2028n-starship-1.24.0/bin/starship init bash --print-full-init)"
fi

eval "$(/nix/store/syha9q8ddz5q5gkvbwmz7cq0hwxxxp03-rbenv-1.3.2/bin/rbenv init - bash)"

function _update_ps1() {
  local old_exit_status=$?
  PS1="$(/nix/store/1jkhybg3wvp9k3n1db24k4if5si0zy4z-powerline-go-1.25/bin/powerline-go -error $old_exit_status -shell bash
)"
  
  return $old_exit_status
}

if [ "$TERM" != "linux" ]; then
  if [[ ";${PROMPT_COMMAND:-};" != *";_update_ps1;"* ]]; then
    PROMPT_COMMAND="_update_ps1${PROMPT_COMMAND:+;$PROMPT_COMMAND}"
  fi
fi

eval "$(/nix/store/m158sdisz2vk0x96br7n8ri5ijfxs4q5-oh-my-posh-26.23.6/bin/oh-my-posh init bash )"

eval "$(/nix/store/msyb4hf0y1cy56zjcnldp0a56nyv94iw-mcfly-0.9.3/bin/mcfly init bash)"

lg() {
    export LAZYGIT_NEW_DIR_FILE=~/.lazygit/newdir
    lazygit "$@"
    if [ -f $LAZYGIT_NEW_DIR_FILE ]; then
      cd "$(cat $LAZYGIT_NEW_DIR_FILE)"
      rm -f $LAZYGIT_NEW_DIR_FILE > /dev/null
    fi
}

eval $(/nix/store/xs8scz9w9jp4hpqycx3n3bah5y07ymgj-coreutils-9.8/bin/dircolors -b ~/.dir_colors)

__HM_PROMPT_COMMAND="${PROMPT_COMMAND:+${PROMPT_COMMAND%;};}__hm_vte_prompt_command"
. /nix/store/ydprqzy85n0pxsrbgdgcwn8x8786hljs-vte-0.80.3/etc/profile.d/vte.sh
if [[ $(type -t __vte_prompt_command) = function ]]; then
  __hm_vte_prompt_command() {
    local old_exit_status=$?
    __vte_prompt_command
    return $old_exit_status
  }
  PROMPT_COMMAND="$__HM_PROMPT_COMMAND"
fi
unset __HM_PROMPT_COMMAND

eval "$(/nix/store/3by7b7afc50p6v1khzj7wyml1rdmagff-direnv-2.37.1/bin/direnv hook bash)"

eval "$(/nix/store/9bj5cgf15bbx3h2ad3jqffm3n5z5s65m-zoxide-0.9.8/bin/zoxide init bash )"
